name: Capanata
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the eggplant in 2 tablespoons olive oil until it is soft. Remove from heat and set aside.
2. In a separate pan, saute the onion, garlic, and celery until fragrant.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (including any necessary water) to the pan. Simmer everything together.
4. Real black olives are those that are black because they have ripened naturally, rather than being treated with Ferrous Gluconate.
